name: Variation of Tandoori Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop onion and garlic, then blend until smooth.
2. Add the remaining dry ingredients and honey to the blender, blending until well combined.
3. Pour the mixture into a large bowl and stir in the yogurt and food coloring.
4. Remove the skin from the chicken.
5. Divide the chicken into parts and cut the breast portions in half (you will have four breast pieces).
6. Score the larger pieces of chicken.
7. Place the chicken in the bowl with the marinade, ensuring it is completely covered.
8. Marinate for 2 to 3 days in the refrigerator, turning occasionally.
9. Cook for a minimum of one hour in a clay pot or grill over medium heat until fully cooked and dry.
